tracks.meaning: a number or quantity that when multiplied by another produces a given number or expression
a circumstance, fact, or influence that contributes to a particular result or situation
a person or company that buys goods from manufacturers and sells them to retailers or other businesses
a person or company legally authorized to act on behalf of another in commercial transactions
to be a key element or influential part in producing something
an element or component that influences behavior, emotions, or mental processes
an element or condition that contributes to or influences the development of a disease or health condition
a substance or element that plays a role in a chemical reaction or process
a gene or hereditary element that influences the expression of traits
a person who works land or manages agricultural production on behalf of a landowner
